title: Verify notification system implementation
description: The notification system described in the task is already fully implemented: src/models/notification.ts (types info/warning/error, read/unread), src/services/notifications.ts (CRUD + mark-as-read), src/routes/notifications.ts (GET/POST), src/utils/notificationHelpers.ts (formatting/filtering), and corresponding unit tests in src/services/notifications.test.ts and src/utils/notificationHelpers.test.ts. Verification confirms all required modules exist and are tested.
existing_patterns: src/utils/result.ts - Result<T, E> discriminated union for explicit error handling
src/services/notifications.ts - Service layer with Payload dependency injection pattern
src/routes/notifications.ts - Express-style route handlers with withAuth wrapper
src/utils/notificationHelpers.ts - Single-function utility modules with co-located tests
